---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  - id: blog-list
    contents:
      - blog.yml
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    fields: [date, title]
    date-format: "MMM YYYY"
    feed:
      title: "Anupam Manur — Blog"
      description: "Essays on public policy, technology, and geopolitics"
      items: 20
---

Essays on public policy, technology, and geopolitics.

::: {#blog-list}
:::
